title: D3D12 PCIe Copy Timing Validation

question.ja: D3D12 で H2D-like / D2H-like copy を測るとき、どの timing method なら CUDA の PCIe 測定値に対しておおむね妥当な値を返せるか。正しい測定の条件は、CUDA pinned 基準値の ±30% 以内かつ理論 PCIe 5.0 x16 片方向帯域以下であること。
question.en: When measuring H2D-like / D2H-like copies in D3D12, which timing methods produce values that are plausibly consistent with the CUDA PCIe benchmark? A method is treated as valid only if it stays within +/-30% of the CUDA pinned reference and also remains below the theoretical one-way PCIe 5.0 x16 limit.

focus: Whether D3D12 can measure PCIe-like copy bandwidth sanely
Compare multiple timing methods on the same copy path

comparisons.ja: CPU wall single-submit, CPU wall batched-submit, GPU timestamp batched-submit の違い
comparisons.en: Difference between CPU wall single-submit, CPU wall batched-submit, and GPU timestamp batched-submit

comparisons.ja: D3D12 H2D-like / D2H-like copy と CUDA pinned PCIe copy の違い
comparisons.en: Difference between D3D12 H2D-like / D2H-like copies and CUDA pinned PCIe copies

comparisons.ja: 実測値が理論 PCIe 5.0 x16 片方向帯域を超えるかどうか
comparisons.en: Whether measured bandwidth exceeds the theoretical one-way PCIe 5.0 x16 limit

considerations.ja: この bench は overlap を測るものではなく、D3D12 copy timing が raw PCIe bandwidth の proxy として使えるかの sanity test である。
considerations.en: This benchmark is not about overlap. It is a sanity test for whether D3D12 copy timing can be used as a proxy for raw PCIe bandwidth.

considerations.ja: H2D-like は UPLOAD heap から DEFAULT resource への copy、D2H-like は DEFAULT resource から READBACK heap への copy と定義する。
considerations.en: H2D-like is defined as a copy from an UPLOAD heap to a DEFAULT resource, and D2H-like is defined as a copy from a DEFAULT resource to a READBACK heap.

considerations.ja: pass 条件は 2 つある。CUDA pinned 基準値の ±30% 以内であること、かつ理論 PCIe 5.0 x16 片方向帯域以下であること。
considerations.en: A method must satisfy two conditions to pass: it must stay within +/-30% of the CUDA pinned reference and it must remain below the theoretical one-way PCIe 5.0 x16 limit.

considerations.ja: もし H2D-like か D2H-like のどちらかで通る method が見つからなければ、この D3D12 path は raw PCIe measurement 用としては invalid と読む。
considerations.en: If no method passes for either H2D-like or D2H-like, this D3D12 path should be treated as invalid for raw PCIe measurement.

considerations.ja: 今回の実装では GPU timestamp batch は COPY command list で E_INVALIDARG になり、少なくともこの形では method として使えなかった。
considerations.en: In this implementation, GPU timestamp batch failed with E_INVALIDARG on the COPY command list, so at least in this form it was not usable as a timing method.

summary.ja: この sanity test では D3D12 raw copy timing は invalid になった。D2H-like は CPU wall method で CUDA pinned 基準に近い値を返したが、H2D-like は全 method で 110-127 GiB/s と理論値を大きく超え、PCIe bandwidth 測定としては使えなかった。
summary.en: This sanity test marked D3D12 raw copy timing as invalid. D2H-like copies produced CUDA-like values under CPU wall methods, but H2D-like copies stayed at 110-127 GiB/s across all methods and exceeded the theoretical limit by a large margin, so they cannot be treated as PCIe bandwidth measurements.

highlights.ja: D2H-like cpu_wall_single: 50.335-51.019 GiB/s, D2H-like cpu_wall_batch: 51.210-51.254 GiB/s
highlights.en: D2H-like cpu_wall_single: 50.335-51.019 GiB/s, D2H-like cpu_wall_batch: 51.210-51.254 GiB/s

highlights.ja: H2D-like cpu_wall_single: 110.410-126.173 GiB/s, H2D-like cpu_wall_batch: 124.199-127.323 GiB/s
highlights.en: H2D-like cpu_wall_single: 110.410-126.173 GiB/s, H2D-like cpu_wall_batch: 124.199-127.323 GiB/s

highlights.ja: gpu_timestamp_batch failed with CommandList::Close: HRESULT 0x80070057 on all tested sizes
highlights.en: gpu_timestamp_batch failed with CommandList::Close: HRESULT 0x80070057 on all tested sizes
